findings.description: The two-column letterhead layout was collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the agency logo is on the left and the official names/titles are aligned on the right. In the HTML, they are stacked in a single column on the left.

findings.description: Footer text was moved to the top of the document, altering the reading order.
findings.evidence: The footer containing the agency's address and contact information from the bottom of the PDF page 1 is placed at the very top of the HTML page, before the memo's main content.

findings.description: A decorative line is rendered incorrectly as a large graphical block.
findings.evidence: The thin colored footer line from the bottom of PDF page 1 is rendered as a thick, disproportionately large colored block in the HTML (visible at the start of HTML page 2).
